user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Implement 3-phase PWM motor control on TC387
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase center-aligned PWM on GTM TOM1 Cluster_1 with complementary outputs and 1 us deadtime at 20 kHz; synchronous start and synchronous (buffered) duty updates; initial duties U=25%, V=50%, W=75% with 10% step and wrap rule; update duty every 500 ms; add a 1 kHz GTM ATOM0 CH0 ISR (priority 20) toggling P13.0; provide initGtmTom3phInv(void) and updateGtmTom3phInvDuty(void); include IfxGtm_periodEventFunction stub; guard GTM enabling.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use the unified high-level IfxGtm_Pwm driver to configure TOM1 Cluster_1 for center-aligned, complementary PWM with DTM deadtime of 1 us and 20 kHz frequency. Start outputs synchronously and use buffered duty updates. Resolve pin routing with IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout for P02.x pins. Use IfxStm timing to gate 500 ms duty updates. Configure ATOM0 CH0 to generate a 1 kHz ISR; install ISR with IfxCpu_Irq_installInterruptHandler and enable its SRC with IfxSrc_enable; toggle P13.0 using IfxPort APIs. Implement a stub IfxGtm_periodEventFunction. Guard GTM enabling using IfxGtm_isEnabled/IfxGtm_enable.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified high-level GTM PWM driver matches the upgrade requirement and supports center-aligned mode, complementary channel handling, DTM deadtime updates, synchronous start, and synchronous updates with simpler APIs.

runtime_function.name: updateGtmTom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Every 500 ms, update the 3-phase PWM duties (U/V/W) by +10% with wrap rule using buffered (synchronous) updates.

driver_changes: Replaced IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl with unified IfxGtm_Pwm for TOM1 Cluster_1 PWM generation.

api_changes.from: IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl synchronous start via manual trigger

api_changes.to: Manual tick calculation using IfxStm_getFrequency and IfxStm_get

migration_notes.context_preserved: All requested functional behaviors are kept: TOM1 Cluster_1 center-aligned complementary PWM with 1 us deadtime at 20 kHz, synchronous start and buffered duty updates, initial duties and stepping logic, 500 ms STM-based duty update, ATOM0 CH0 1 kHz ISR toggling P13.0, GTM enable guard, preserved function names initGtmTom3phInv and updateGtmTom3phInvDuty, and an IfxGtm_periodEventFunction stub.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
